sections.paragraph:
ϰαταλαμβάνω [κατά, λαμβάνω]

—1. ‘take over’, grasp

—a. in hostile sense seize Mk 9:18. In non-hostile sense secure Ro 9:30; 1 Cor 9:24; Phil 3:12f (in wordplay with λαμβάνω and as a result of διώκω).

—b. of mental grasping (cp. our ‘catch on’), perceive, comprehend Ac 4:13; 10:34; 25:25; Eph 3:18.

—c. in ext. sense with component of surprise catch, come upon J 8:3f; in imagery 1 Th 5:4.

—2. in J 1:5 ideas in 1ab above blend in the double sense of grasp as seize and comprehend.
